subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में किस मंगल का स्थान है?
explanation_en:
Mehrangarh Fort is a famous fort located in Jodhpur, built in the 15th century by Rao Jodha of the Rathore clan.
In Hindi: 
Mehrangarh Fort is a renowned fort situated in Jodhpur, constructed in the 15th century by Rao Jodha from the Rathore clan.
